subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of God proclaimeth and beareth witness to the Beauty of the Promised One, Who hath appeared with manifest sovereignty, and saith: O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینطق لسان الله و یشهد لجمال الموعود الذی ظهر بسلطان مشهود و یقول یا ملا
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
